name: KrillApp.Executor.SMTP
title: SMTP
description: Sends an email via SMTP when invoked. Uses the input node's name as the email subject. If the input is a DataPoint, the latest snapshot value is included in the email body. Configure SMTP server, port, credentials, and recipient address.
shortDescription: Sends an email via SMTP when a node it observes completes.
llmPurpose: Sends an email notification via SMTP with input node data when a node it observes completes.
llmBehavior: invoked when an observed source completes (SOURCE_INVOKED)
connects to configured SMTP server with credentials
builds email subject from input node name
includes DataPoint snapshot value in email body if the input is a DataPoint
sends plain text email to configured recipient
llmTypicalUseCases: send email alert when sensor value changes
notify via email when a threshold is crossed
email notification on device state change
llmCreationHints: Create an SMTP executor when the user wants email notifications. Requires SMTP server host, port, credentials, and recipient address. List the trigger or DataPoint to watch in the SMTP node's sources with SOURCE_INVOKED, and also in inputs to include its value in the email.

llmConnectionHints.role: action node that sends email notifications via SMTP
llmConnectionHints.wiring: Observer-side: list the trigger or DataPoint to watch in sources with SOURCE_INVOKED (and in inputs to include its value in the email body); nothing typically observes an SMTP node.

llmExamples: Send me an email when the temperature sensor goes above the threshold.
Email an alert when the device goes offline.
Send an SMTP notification with the latest reading.
